Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to analyze each case Normative process sequence must be Always start with Receive order Then Check inventory If inventory sufficient Authorize payment Package items Ship order Close order If insufficient Cancel order Close order Also constraints Authorize payment only after Check inventory and before packaging Package only after authorization and before shipping Ship only after packaging and never after cancellation Close final

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1 Sequence matches normal flow no violation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 Sequence is Receive Check Package Authorize Ship Close Violations Package occurs before Authorize payment should be after Authorize occurs after package violates ordering Thus violation of Package items should only occur after authorization and Authorize payment should be before packaging Also shipping occurs after package but that is fine

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 3 Sequence is Receive Check Authorize Cancel Ship Close Violations After canceling an order you should not ship shipping occurs post cancel which violates Ship order should not occur after cancellation Also maybe cancel should happen immediately after check if insufficient but here we had authorize then cancel Actually normative says if insufficient inventory then Cancel directly but the log does not indicate whether inventory was sufficient The presence of Cancel suggests insufficiency so authorizing before cancel is also wrong because you should not authorize when there is not enough stock

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 4 Sequence is Receive Check Cancel Close correct for insufficient scenario Yes matches expected sequence for cancellation scenario No violations

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 5 Sequence is Receive Check Authorize Ship Close missing Package step between Authorization and Shipping violates rule that package must happen between authorization and shipping Also shipping without packaging violates rule about ship requiring packaged items

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Thus violations identified Case2 wrong ordering between package and authorize Case3 ship after cancel and likely authorize before cancellation in a cancellation path Case5 missing package
